## 📋 Prequisites

Take a couple minutes to help our maintainers work faster.

- [ ] I have [searched](https://github.com/netwk-pro/netwk-pro.github.io/issues?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=is%3Aissue) for duplicate or closed issues.
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/netwk-pro/netwk-pro.github.io/blob/master/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md).

## 🔍 Bug Description

Clearly describe the issue.

## 🧪 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 📍 Affected Area

- [ ] Website
- [ ] Client Portal
- [ ] Legal Docs
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] API
- [ ] UI/UX

## 🧠 Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

## 🖥️ What operating system(s) are you seeing the problem on?

- [ ] Windows
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Android
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Linux

## 🌐 What browser(s) are you seeing the problem on?

- [ ] Chrome
- [ ] Safari
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Microsoft Edge
- [ ] Opera
- [ ] Development Environment

## 📝 Reduced Test Case

Please include [reduced test case](https://css-tricks.com/reduced-test-cases/) links where possible.

## 📸 Screenshots or Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console logs.

## 📅 Priority

- [ ] High 🔥
- [ ] Medium ⚠️
- [ ] Low ⏳
